channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Russia has suffered more casualties in Ukraine war than all other conflicts combined since WWII: Pentagon
item.description: Russia has suffered some 600,000 casualties in its war with Ukraine – more than its losses in every conflict since World War II combined, according to U.S. officials.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mayorkas doubles down, hammers 'pernicious' misinformation amid FEMA criticism
item.description: Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas is furiously pushing back against what he says is "pernicious" misinformation, sometimes spread deliberately, as the agency attempts to deliver relief.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump leads Harris by 4 points in Florida: Survey
item.description: Former President Trump is leading Vice President Harris by a narrow 4 points in Florida, according to a new survey of likely voters in the state.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, NewsNation

item.title: Biden tells Trump to 'get a life, man' and stop storm misinformation
item.description: President Joe Biden said Thursday that his predecessor Donald Trump should “get a life” and try to help people impacted by a pair of devastating hurricanes, rather than spread misinformation about the federal response.
item.dc:creator: Josh Boak And Will Weissert, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Obama-era DACA program heads back to federal appeals court
item.description: Legal wranglings pertaining to DACA program persist with arguments before the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Harris' struggles with Michigan's working-class voters provides opening for Trump, GOP
item.description: Republicans in Michigan and the rest of the "Blue Wall" states are hoping to capitalize on Vice President Kamala Harris' struggles among working class and union voters.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former law enforcement officers, military vets step up to save stranded hurricane survivors without FEMA
item.description: A group of civilians has banded together to help with disaster relief in North Carolina in the aftermath of Hurricane Helene, which devastated several areas of the state.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lake blames Gallego for border woes, he vows to protect abortion rights in Arizona Senate debate
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Republican Senate candidate Kari Lake repeatedly reminded viewers Wednesday of her three-decade career on Arizona television, looking to harness the intimate connection she built with voters and overcome Democrat Ruben Gallego's portrayal of her as a liar in the only debate of the clo
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN J. COOPER and GABRIEL SANDOVAL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Republican NY-18 candidate Alison Esposito says America doesn’t have a gun problem
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Alison Esposito, a Republican candidate running for Congress in New York’s 18th District, said she does not support a ban on assault weapons and that America doesn’t have a gun problem. Esposito made the comments during a debate against Democratic U.S. Rep.
item.dc:creator: Finn Hoogensen, PIX 11

item.title: Ryan Hamilton discusses homelessness, the Animal Foundation, and F1
item.description: Ryan Hamilton, a Republican candidate for the Clark County Commission, appeared on 8 News Now's Daily Voting Guide to share his perspective on homelessness, animal welfare, and Formula One's impact on the local economy as the election nears.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Pat Ryan, Alison Esposito face off in NY-18 debate on PIX11
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Democratic U.S. Rep. Pat Ryan and Republican Alison Esposito, the two candidates running to represent New York's 18th Congressional District, faced off in a debate on PIX11 Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Ben Mitchell, NewsNation

item.title: This is FEMA's role in preparing for Hurricane Milton
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Hurricane Milton is set to slam Florida on Wednesday evening — the second hurricane to strike in two weeks — and the federal agency tasked with responding to disasters is once again positioning supplies and personnel where they're needed and coordinating with state and local offici
item.dc:creator: REBECCA SANTANA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: House Democrats' campaign chief defends vulnerable members keeping distance from Harris
item.description: NEW YORK — Rep. Suzan DelBene (D-Wash.), the House Democrats’ campaign chief, is defending vulnerable lawmakers who have kept their distance from Vice President Harris while campaigning.
item.dc:creator: Mychael Schnell, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jury selection begins in corruption trial of longest-serving legislative leader in US history
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Jury selection began Wednesday in the corruption trial of former Illinois House Speaker Michael Madigan, once the longest-serving legislative leader in American history. The case against Madigan, who resigned in 2021, is one of Illinois’ largest corruption trials in years.
item.dc:creator: SOPHIA TAREEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hurricanes force changes to Florida's election procedures
item.description: With Florida still recovering from Hurricane Helene, some state and local officials are bracing for more disruptions from Hurricane Milton that could affect how people vote in the general election. Gov.
item.dc:creator: DAVID A. LIEB and BRENDAN FARRINGTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump-Putin ties are back in the spotlight after new book describes calls
item.description: A new book's assertion that former President Donald Trump may have had as many as seven private phone calls with Russian President Vladimir Putin since leaving the White House has refocused attention on their politically fraught relationship and on Trump's sustained dialogue with world leaders as he
item.dc:creator: ERIC TUCKER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: The presidential campaigns have made over 200 visits but speak to just a fraction of American voters
item.description: The nation's unique Electoral College system for electing a president, which replaces the popular vote, puts disproportionate voting power in the hands of a relative few states.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, MPR News

item.title: Brown says no to pro-Palestinian students' demands for divestment
item.description: Supporters of divestment ended their encampment last spring in exchange for a promise that their proposal for divestment would get a vote from the board this fall.
item.dc:creator: Tovia Smith, MPR News

item.title: How to watch the NY-18 Debate: Ryan vs. Esposito
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – Candidates in the race for New York’s 18th Congressional District will face off in a debate Wednesday night. Democratic incumbent Congressman Pat Ryan will take on Republican challenger Alison Esposito in a 60-minute debate moderated by PIX11’s Henry Rosoff.
item.dc:creator: Dominique Jack, PIX 11

item.title: Michigan US Senate debate: Rogers, Slotkin race could determine control
item.description: Rogers and Slotkin meet on Tuesday for an hour-long debate hosted by Nexstar's WOOD-TV, beginning at 7 p.m. ET.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Van Gilder, Fox 5

item.title: Biden postpones trip to Germany and Angola to monitor Hurricane Milton
item.description: President Joe Biden said Tuesday he is postponing a planned trip to Germany and Angola to stay at the White House to monitor Hurricane Milton, as it spins closer to Florida’s Gulf Coast.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Your guide to voting in Minnesota: Registration, absentee ballots and general election details
item.description: We are less than a month out from Election Day. Here are answers to some frequently asked questions MPR News readers asked us about the upcoming election.
item.dc:creator: Anika Besst and Nicole Johnson, MPR News

item.title: Michael Naft discusses traffic safety, F1, and animal welfare in the Las Vegas valley
item.description: Michael Naft, incumbent county commissioner for District 8, joined Brian Loftis on the 8 News Now Daily Voting Guide Monday, discussing his campaign priorities as election day nears.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Trump's plan would add $4 trillion more to U.S. debt compared to Harris', analysis says
item.description: Neither former President Donald Trump nor Vice President Kamala Harris have plans to fix the national debt, risking "an eventual fiscal crisis," a budget nonprofit group found in its analysis.
item.dc:creator: Luke Garrett, MPR News

item.title: Trump urges his supporters to deliver victory in his return to scene of first assassination attempt
item.description: BUTLER, Pa. (AP) — Donald Trump returned on Saturday to the Pennsylvania fairgrounds where he was nearly assassinated in July, urging a large crowd to deliver an Election Day victory that he tied to his survival of the shooting.
item.dc:creator: JULIE CARR SMYTH, JILL COLVIN and ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Obama to campaign for Harris in key swing states, starting with Pennsylvania
item.description: Former President Obama is set to hit the campaign trail for Vice President Harris this month, starting his blitz in the key battleground state of Pennsylvania next week.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5
